title: NTLA's Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Pipeline in Focus
text: Intellia Therapeutics reported revenues of $9.1 million for the third quarter of 2024 compared with $12 million reported in the year-ago quarter, though revenues beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $8 million. The company's Phase 3 studies for hereditary angioedema (HAE) and transthyretin amyloidosis (ATTR) continue advancing, with expectations to complete enrollment in the HAELO study by the second half of 2025. For its transthyretin amyloidosis program (Nex-z), Intellia presented positive extended follow-up data from its Phase 1 trial showing deep and sustained TTR reduction. The collaboration revenue was $12.9 million during Q4 2024. The company is focusing on advancing its clinical pipeline while implementing cost management measures for the upcoming year. Management expects a 5% to 10% year-over-year decline in GAAP operating expenses for 2025.
